name: Chipotle Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Mashed canned chipotle-chile (from a can of chipotles en Adobo)
recipeInstructions:
"Chipotle" chilies are a Mexican ingredient, hot smoked jalapenos packed in a vinegary adobo sauce. They are VERY hot. A little goes a long way.
1. Mix the chipotle, the juices, garlic and olive oil together.
2. Roll out pizza dough to a 10-inch circle; place on a baking sheet.
3. Spread chipotle topping over dough, then sprinkle with the grated cheeses.
4. Bake for about 20 minutes.
5. Cut into wedges.
